items.name: Lighter
items.description: An old, rusted lighter. Still works.
items.effect: Provides light in dark places. Sanity +2 in dark rooms.

items.name: Flashlight
items.description: A heavy-duty flashlight. The beam is steady.
items.effect: Provides powerful light. Sanity +5 in dark rooms.

items.name: Holy Water
items.description: Blessed water from an old chapel.

items.name: Crucifix
items.effect: Provides spiritual protection. Can be used to banish weaker entities.

items.name: Confessional Key
items.description: A tarnished brass key that opens the confessional.
items.effect: Required to open the confessional room.

items.name: Camera
items.description: An old film camera. The shutter still clicks.
items.effect: Can capture paranormal phenomena. Evidence collected is more valuable.

items.name: Voice Recorder
items.description: A vintage tape recorder with fresh batteries.
items.effect: Captures EVP (Electronic Voice Phenomena). Evidence collected is more valuable.

items.name: Cameo Locket
items.description: A delicate piece of jewelry containing a mysterious photograph.
items.effect: Reveals secrets about the mansion's past. Sanity -2 but adds valuable evidence.

items.name: Cursed Relic
items.description: A stone idol that radiates malevolent energy.
items.effect: Increases paranormal sensitivity. Sanity -3 but attracts entities. Evidence is more valuable.

items.name: Cursed Bone
items.description: A bone arranged with ritualistic precision.
items.effect: Connects you to the mansion's past. Sanity -5 but reveals hidden truths.

items.name: Forbidden Book
items.description: A leather-bound book containing forbidden knowledge.
items.effect: Reading grants terrifying insights. Sanity -10 but this is the key to understanding the entity.
